entities.name: Articulation Gap
entities.context: The phenomenon where candidates fail to translate their intrinsic value into formats employers can parse

entities.name: Resume
entities.context: Document format that candidates use but often fail to leverage effectively

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Platform where candidates struggle to present their value

entities.name: Fiber Optic Communication Problem
entities.context: Metaphor V uses to describe the bandwidth/translation issue in candidate-employer communication

relationships.context: Resumes are a key site where the articulation gap manifests
LinkedIn profiles are another site where candidates fail to translate value
The fiber optic metaphor describes the nature of the articulation gap
